title: Hymenachne amplexicaulis
taxonomy: Hymenachne amplexicaulis is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is commonly known as signal grass and is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. This species is part of the subfamily Chloridoideae, which includes many types of grasses. Hymenachne amplexicaulis is further classified into the tribe Cynodonteae, a group of grasses that are mostly found in warm and temperate climates. The classification of Hymenachne amplexicaulis is essential in understanding its characteristics and behavior.
uses: Hymenachne amplexicaulis has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities.
